problem_text_cn:
## 四、(20分)

如图所示的电路中，$t<0$时，电容器充电过程已完成。$t=0$时，接通电键K。将接通前瞬间时刻记为$t=0^{-}$，接通后瞬间时刻记为$t=0^{+}$，$t≥0^{+}$时，按图中虚线所示方向设定各路电流$I_1$，$I_2$，$I_C$和$I_3$的流向。
(1)导出$t=0^{-}$时刻A，B间电压$U_{AB}(0^{-})$和$I_1(0^{-})$，$I_2(0^{-})$以及电容器上方极板电量$Q(0^{-})$；
(2)导出$t=0^{+}$时刻A，B间电压$U_{AB}(0^{+})$和$I_1(0^{+})$，$I_2(0^{+})$，$I_C(0^{+})$，$I_3(0^{+})$以及电容器上方极板电量$Q(0^{+})$；
(3)导出任意$t≥0^{+}$时刻的$I_1(t)$，$I_2(t)$，$I_C(t)$，$I_3(t)$和电容器上方极板电量$Q(t)$。
problem_text_en:
## Four. (20 points)

In the circuit shown, for $t<0$ the capacitor charging process is completed. At $t=0$, switch K is closed. The moment just before closing is denoted as $t=0^{-}$, and the moment just after closing is denoted as $t=0^{+}$. For $t≥0^{+}$, the currents $I_1$, $I_2$, $I_C$, and $I_3$ are defined with the directions indicated by the dashed lines in the figure.
(1) Derive the voltage $U_{AB}(0^{-})$ between A and B, the currents $I_1(0^{-})$, $I_2(0^{-})$, and the charge $Q(0^{-})$ on the upper plate of the capacitor at $t=0^{-}$.
(2) Derive the voltage $U_{AB}(0^{+})$ between A and B, the currents $I_1(0^{+})$, $I_2(0^{+})$, $I_C(0^{+})$, $I_3(0^{+})$, and the charge $Q(0^{+})$ on the upper plate of the capacitor at $t=0^{+}$.
(3) Derive $I_1(t)$, $I_2(t)$, $I_C(t)$, $I_3(t)$, and the charge $Q(t)$ on the upper plate of the capacitor for any $t≥0^{+}$.
problem_solution_en:
## Four. (20 points)
(1)
$$ U_{AB}(0^{-})=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}\mathscr{E},\quad I_{1}(0^{-})=I_{2}(0^{-})=\frac{\mathscr{E}}{R_{1}+R_{2}},\quad Q(0^{-})=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}C\mathscr{E}.\qquad(4\text{ points}) $$
(2) During the infinitesimal interval $dt$ from $t=0^{-}$ to $t=0^{+}$, the charge $Q$ on the upper plate of the capacitor may change; such a change must be realized by a finite current $I_{c}$, and the increment must be infinitesimal. The infinitesimal increment $dQ$ ensures that
$$ U_{AB}(0^{+})=U_{AB}(0^{-})=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}\mathscr{E}\qquad(2\text{ points}) $$
holds. Consequently,
$$ I_{1}(0^{+})=[\mathscr{E}-U_{AB}(0^{+})]/R_{1}=\frac{\mathscr{E}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}=I_{1}(0^{-}),\qquad(1\text{ point}) $$
$$ I_{2}(0^{+})=U_{AB}(0^{+})/R_{2}=\frac{\mathscr{E}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}=I_{2}(0^{-}),\qquad(1\text{ point}) $$
$$ I_{3}(0^{+})=U_{AB}(0^{+})/R_{3}=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{3}(R_{1}+R_{2})}\mathscr{E},\qquad(1\text{ point}) $$
$$ I_{c}(0^{+})=I_{1}(0^{+})-I_{2}(0^{+})-I_{3}(0^{+})=-I_{3}(0^{+})=-\frac{R_{2}}{R_{3}(R_{1}+R_{2})}\mathscr{E}.\qquad(1\text{ point}) $$
Since
$$ dQ=I_{c}(0^{+})dt=-\frac{R_{2}}{R_{3}(R_{1}+R_{2})}\mathscr{E}dt<0,\quad\text{and is infinitesimal}, $$
we have
$$ Q(0^{+})=Q(0^{-})+dQ=Q(0^{-})=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}}C\mathscr{E}.\qquad(1\text{ point}) $$
Thus, during the infinitesimal interval from $t=0^{-}$ to $t=0^{+}$, $I_{c}(0^{+})$ is opposite to the direction shown in the figure and becomes the newly added $I_{3}(0^{+})$ current.
(3) From
$$ \mathscr{E}=I_{1}R_{1}+I_{2}R_{2}, $$
$$ I_{1}=I_{2}+I_{3}+I_{c},\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathscr{E}=I_{2}(R_{1}+R_{2})+I_{3}R_{1}+I_{c}R_{1}, $$
$$ I_{3}R_{3}=I_{2}R_{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathscr{E}=\frac{R_{1}R_{2}+R_{2}R_{3}+R_{3}R_{1}}{R_{3}}I_{2}+I_{c}R_{1}, $$
$$ I_{2}R_{2}=Q/C,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathscr{E}=\frac{R_{1}R_{2}+R_{2}R_{3}+R_{3}R_{1}}{CR_{2}R_{3}}Q+I_{c}R_{1}, $$
$$ I_{c}=dQ/dt,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathscr{E}=\frac{R_{1}R_{2}+R_{2}R_{3}+R_{3}R_{1}}{CR_{2}R_{3}}Q+R_{1}\frac{dQ}{dt}, $$
we obtain
$$ \frac{dQ}{dt}=-(AQ-B),\quad\begin{cases}A=\frac{R_{1}R_{2}+R_{2}R_{3}+R_{3}R_{1}}{CR_{1}R_{2}R_{3}},\\B=\mathscr{E}/R_{1}.\end{cases} $$
img_cn:
该电路图展示了一个包含电阻、电容和开关的直流电路。电路中有三个电阻，分别标记为$R_1$、$R_2$和$R_3$；一个电容C；一个开关K；以及一个直流电源$\varepsilon$。

在$t<0$时，电容器已充满电。$t=0$时闭合开关K。图中定义了四个电流：$I_1$、$I_2$、$I_C$和$I_3$，其流向如虚线箭头所示。

$R_1$与$R_2$串联形成一条支路，$R_3$单独形成另一条支路，两条支路并联后与电容C串联。开关K控制着$R_3$支路的通断。

要求解三个问题：
1. 开关闭合前瞬间($t=0^{-}$)的电压和电流
2. 开关闭合后瞬间($t=0^{+}$)的电压和电流
3. 开关闭合后任意时刻($t≥0^{+}$)的电流和电荷
图片展示了一道电磁学相关数学计算的局部内容。包含多组电路参数公式，如电容电压、电流表达式等。还有积分运算过程以求解电量随时间变化的函数$Q(t)$，并进一步推导得出其他电流相关的函数。公式中包含电阻$R$、电容$C$、电源电动势$\varepsilon$、时间$t$等物理量和数学符号。
img_en:
The circuit diagram shows a DC circuit containing resistors, a capacitor, and a switch. There are three resistors marked as $R_1$, $R_2$, and $R_3$; a capacitor C; a switch K; and a DC power supply $\varepsilon$.

When $t<0$, the capacitor is fully charged. At $t=0$, switch K is closed. Four currents are defined in the diagram: $I_1$, $I_2$, $I_C$, and $I_3$, with their directions indicated by dashed arrows.

$R_1$ and $R_2$ are in series to form one branch, while $R_3$ forms a separate branch. These two branches are in parallel and connected in series with capacitor C. Switch K controls the connection of the $R_3$ branch.

Three problems are to be solved:
1. Voltage and current at the instant just before closing the switch ($t=0^{-}$)
2. Voltage and current at the instant just after closing the switch ($t=0^{+}$)
3. Currents and charge at any time ($t≥0^{+}$) after the switch is closed.

The image shows part of an electromagnetic calculation with mathematical content. It includes multiple sets of circuit‑parameter formulas, such as expressions for capacitor voltage and current. There is also an integration operation process to solve for the function $Q(t)$ representing the charge over time, and further derivation of other current‑related functions. Physical quantities and mathematical symbols in the formulas include resistance $R$, capacitance $C$, power supply electromotive force $\varepsilon$, and time $t$.
